# ccxl (Claude Code XL)

> Full-stack AI coding assistant configurator. One scan generates complete configs for Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, and Windsurf.

## What This Does

ccxl scans any project directory, detects languages/frameworks/infrastructure, and generates the full configuration stack for 4 AI coding tools — tuned to the specific project, not boilerplate.

## Commands

- `ccxl init` — Scan project and generate all configs (--dry-run, --yes, --global, --force)
- `ccxl generate <layer>` — Generate specific config: settings, skills, hooks, agents, mcp, claude-md, cross-tool, all
- `ccxl install <user/repo>` — Install community config package from GitHub
- `ccxl registry search|list|browse|publish|uninstall` — Manage packages
- `ccxl update` — Detect config drift, suggest updates (--apply)
- `ccxl doctor` — Run diagnostics with auto-fix (--fix)
- `ccxl config show|set|check|reset` — Manage base configs and governance

## Architecture

TypeScript, ESM-only, Node >= 20.

- src/analyzer/ — 9 detectors (languages, frameworks, package managers, CI/CD, cloud, databases, Docker, monorepo, existing AI configs)
- src/generators/ — 7 generators (settings.json, skills, hooks, agents, MCP, CLAUDE.md, cross-tool)
- src/generators/cross-tool/ — Cursor (.mdc), Copilot (.instructions.md), Windsurf adapters
- src/registry/ — GitHub-based package registry (install, uninstall, search, list)
- src/maintenance/ — Drift detection and diagnostics
- src/governance/ — Team base configs with policy enforcement
- src/tui/ — Ink (React) terminal UI components
- src/commands/ — Commander CLI command handlers

## Key Patterns

- Detector interface: { name, detect(root) } with DetectorRegistry running all in parallel
- Generator interface: { name, generate(analysis, root) } with pipeline dedup by path
- Template pattern: declarative arrays with condition functions for skills/hooks/agents
- Non-destructive merge: JSON union for permissions, skip existing markdown/scripts
- Zod schema-first types throughout

## What Gets Generated

Claude Code: .claude/settings.json, .claude/skills/*/SKILL.md, .claude/hooks/*.sh, .claude/agents/*.md, .mcp.json, CLAUDE.md
Cursor: .cursorrules, .cursor/rules/*.mdc
Copilot: .github/copilot-instructions.md, .github/instructions/*.instructions.md
Windsurf: .windsurfrules, .windsurf/rules/*.md

## Detection

Languages: JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Go, Rust, Java, Swift
Frameworks: React, Next.js, Vue, Nuxt, Svelte, Angular, Express, Fastify, Prisma, Drizzle, Django, Flask, FastAPI, Vite, Vitest, Jest, and more
Infrastructure: GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, CircleCI, AWS, GCP, Azure, Vercel, Netlify, Fly, PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, MongoDB, Redis, Docker, Turborepo, Nx, pnpm workspaces
